introSection: Congo Cruizer is an indoor steel kiddie roller coaster located at Safari Land in Villa Park, Illinois, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The first information revealed about Congo Cruizer was that it wouldn't be an SBF Visa Spinning Coaster, unlike what was rumored, on January 8, 2025. The coaster's name would unofficially be revealed on April 24, 2025 before it was later officially revealed by Safari Land's Facebook account.

Following Tiger Terror's closure on August 17, 2025, Congo Cruizer would began to be shipped from E&F Miler's warehouse to Safari Land, where it would be built on the former's plot of land.

Congo Cruizer officially opened on September 27, 2025, but held a soft opening on September 24.

fullText:
Congo Cruizer is an indoor steel kiddie roller coaster located at Safari Land in Villa Park, Illinois, USA.

The first information revealed about Congo Cruizer was that it wouldn't be an SBF Visa Spinning Coaster, unlike what was rumored, on January 8, 2025. The coaster's name would unofficially be revealed on April 24, 2025 before it was later officially revealed by Safari Land's Facebook account.

Following Tiger Terror's closure on August 17, 2025, Congo Cruizer would began to be shipped from E&F Miler's warehouse to Safari Land, where it would be built on the former's plot of land.

Congo Cruizer officially opened on September 27, 2025, but held a soft opening on September 24.
